title: Notebook edit view component with diff visualization
purpose: Displays notebook editing operations with before/after diffs and status indicators for agent tool calls.

steps.content: Extract the tool call input data from the item prop.
Destructure notebook path, cell ID, new source, cell type, and edit mode from the input.
Determine the effective edit mode, defaulting to replace if not specified.
Compute the line diff based on the edit mode and new source content.
Render the notebook path and cell ID badges if present.
Display the edit mode badge with appropriate styling based on the mode.
Show the cell type badge if specified.
Render the split diff view showing before and after content.

methods.name: computeLineDiff
methods.normalized_params: (oldText: string, newText: string): { kind: string; text: string }[]

steps.content: Generate a line-by-line diff between the old and new text content.
Return the diff result with kind indicators for additions, deletions, and unchanged lines.
